request_text: Remediate #1894: extract _fold_policies() in doctrine/org_charter.py — collapse the triple-duplicated merge-fold body (~80 lines) and surface the latent schema_version handling delta as an explicit parameter

evidence_ref: _fold_policies extracted (commit 53c0f4798): 3-site behavioral matrix verified (only schema_version diverged — strict raises vs lenient last-truthy); parameterized strict_schema_version (default lenient = 2-of-3 sites + lower-risk); 7 new tests incl. end-to-end parity pin of the preserved inconsistency; 223 doctrine tests green, 341 architectural, net -29 LOC, zero existing tests modified
